notes: Core mechanics work but asteroid size/level logic is off (createAsteroid lvl detection is broken since initial radius is ASTEROIDS_SIZE/2=50, not ASTEROIDS_SIZE/2=50 matching lvl0 check), shooting conflicts with space-to-start, and asteroid speeds feel slow due to the fixed xv/yv calculation ignoring level scaling.
Excellent implementation with accurate physics, splitting asteroids, and wireframe visuals, though it lacks the UFO and hyperspace mechanics from the original arcade game.
Core Asteroids loop is present and mostly works, but start/fire sharing Space and simplistic collision/physics keep it from feeling fully polished.
